pr.title: T5: Phase-Based Depth Recurrence + MLA + Graduated Precision (Non-Record)

output.summary: Phase-based recurrence reuses 8 unique blocks across four specialized phases with MLA and graduated FP4→Int6 precision to keep T5 depth under ~13MB.
techniques: Phase-based depth recurrence with specialization across lexical/syntax/semantic/predict phases
Multi-Head Latent Attention low-rank KV compression within each layer
Graduated FP4→Int6 precision scheduling plus FP8 state with stochastic rounding
